User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block landing pages (paid ad LPs, noindex via meta too)
Disallow: /landing/

# Block admin / internal paths
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /partials/
Disallow: /data/
Disallow: /docs/

# Block server-generated files
Disallow: /*.csv$
Disallow: /*.log$
Disallow: /*.json$

# Allow CSS, JS, images
Allow: /assets/

Sitemap: https://cioncancerdrimad.com/sitemap.xml
